requirements.title: Risk Management System
requirements.description: Banks must maintain an adequate risk management system with documented processes for identifying, measuring, controlling and monitoring all material risks.

requirements.title: Encryption of Financial PII
requirements.description: Customer financial data including IBAN, card numbers, account balances must be encrypted at rest and in transit using AES-256 or equivalent.

requirements.title: Strong Customer Authentication (SCA)
requirements.description: All electronic payment transactions must implement SCA using at least 2 of: knowledge, possession, inherence factors.

requirements.title: KYC & Customer Due Diligence
requirements.description: Identity verification must be completed before account activation. Enhanced due diligence required for high-risk customers.

requirements.title: Right to Erasure
requirements.description: Customer data deletion requests must be fulfilled within 30 days, with documented audit trail of deletion.

requirements.title: Card Data Protection
requirements.description: CVV/CVC data must never be stored post-authorization. Full PAN storage requires tokenization. No card data in logs.

requirements.title: Risk Management System
requirements.description: Banks must maintain an adequate risk management system with documented processes for identifying, measuring, controlling and monitoring all material risks.

requirements.title: Encryption of Financial PII
requirements.description: Customer financial data including IBAN, card numbers, account balances must be encrypted at rest and in transit using AES-256 or equivalent.

requirements.title: Strong Customer Authentication (SCA)
requirements.description: All electronic payment transactions must implement SCA using at least 2 of: knowledge, possession, inherence factors.

requirements.title: KYC & Customer Due Diligence
requirements.description: Identity verification must be completed before account activation. Enhanced due diligence required for high-risk customers.

requirements.title: Right to Erasure
requirements.description: Customer data deletion requests must be fulfilled within 30 days, with documented audit trail of deletion.

requirements.title: Card Data Protection
requirements.description: CVV/CVC data must never be stored post-authorization. Full PAN storage requires tokenization. No card data in logs.

requirements.title: Operational Resilience
requirements.description: Banks must identify important business services and set impact tolerances for disruptions, with documented recovery procedures.

requirements.title: Data Encryption Standards
requirements.description: All customer financial records must use encryption at rest. TLS 1.2+ required for all data in transit.

requirements.title: Payment Services Regulations
requirements.description: Strong authentication required for remote transactions. Fraud liability frameworks must be implemented.

requirements.title: Anti-Money Laundering Controls
requirements.description: Automated transaction monitoring systems required. Suspicious activity reports must be filed within 7 days.

requirements.title: Client Communication Standards
requirements.description: All client communications must be fair, clear, and not misleading. Fee disclosures are mandatory.

requirements.title: Risk Management System
requirements.description: Banks must maintain an adequate risk management system with documented processes for identifying, measuring, controlling and monitoring all material risks.

requirements.title: Encryption of Financial PII
requirements.description: Customer financial data including IBAN, card numbers, account balances must be encrypted at rest and in transit using AES-256 or equivalent.

requirements.title: Strong Customer Authentication (SCA)
requirements.description: All electronic payment transactions must implement SCA using at least 2 of: knowledge, possession, inherence factors.

requirements.title: KYC & Customer Due Diligence
requirements.description: Identity verification must be completed before account activation. Enhanced due diligence required for high-risk customers.

requirements.title: Right to Erasure
requirements.description: Customer data deletion requests must be fulfilled within 30 days, with documented audit trail of deletion.

requirements.title: Card Data Protection
requirements.description: CVV/CVC data must never be stored post-authorization. Full PAN storage requires tokenization. No card data in logs.

requirements.title: Customer Identification Programme
requirements.description: BVN verification mandatory for all individual accounts. NIN required for accounts above tier 1 limits.

requirements.title: Data Lawful Basis
requirements.description: Personal data processing must have a documented lawful basis. Consent must be freely given and withdrawable.

requirements.title: Transaction Monitoring
requirements.description: Automated monitoring for suspicious transactions above ₦5M. Reports to NFIU within 24 hours.

requirements.title: Card Data Security
requirements.description: No CVV storage permitted. Tokenization required for card transactions. EMV chip compliance mandatory.

requirements.title: Safeguards Rule
requirements.description: Financial institutions must implement a comprehensive information security program with designated security officer.

requirements.title: Bank Secrecy Act Compliance
requirements.description: CTR filing for cash transactions >$10k. SAR filing for suspicious activity >$5k. Customer due diligence program required.

requirements.title: California Consumer Privacy
requirements.description: Right to know, delete, and opt-out of sale of personal information for California residents.

requirements.title: Electronic Fund Transfer Act
requirements.description: Error resolution procedures and liability limits for unauthorized electronic transfers must be documented.

sg.framework: MAS TRM + PDPA + Payment Services Act

requirements.title: IT Risk Management
requirements.description: Board-approved IT risk appetite statement required. Penetration testing annually for internet-facing systems.

requirements.title: Data Protection
requirements.description: Reasonable security arrangements to prevent unauthorized access, collection, use, disclosure, copying or disposal.

requirements.title: Payment Services License
requirements.description: License required for payment services. AML/CFT controls, user protection measures and cybersecurity requirements apply.

requirements.title: Card Data Protection

requirements.title: Customs Data Encryption
requirements.description: All electronic customs declarations containing recipient personal data must be transmitted over encrypted channels (TLS 1.3+).

requirements.title: Cross-Border Data Transfer Controls
requirements.description: Transfers of EU resident data to third countries require adequacy decision or standard contractual clauses.

requirements.title: Recipient Notification
requirements.description: Recipients must be notified that their personal data will be shared with customs authorities in destination country.

requirements.title: Data Retention Limits
requirements.description: Shipment records containing PII must be purged after regulatory retention period (typically 10 years). Automated deletion required.

requirements.title: Electronic Signature on Manifests
requirements.description: Customs manifests for cross-border shipments should use qualified electronic signatures for authenticity.

requirements.title: Customs Data Encryption
requirements.description: All electronic customs declarations containing recipient personal data must be transmitted over encrypted channels (TLS 1.3+).

gb.framework: UK GDPR + HMRC Customs + Border Protocol

requirements.title: International Transfer Safeguards
requirements.description: UK GDPR standard contractual clauses required for personal data transferred outside UK in customs processing.

requirements.title: Customs Declaration Service (CDS)
requirements.description: All imports must use HMRC Customs Declaration Service. EORI number required for all commercial shipments.

requirements.title: Data Erasure on Request
requirements.description: Recipient data must be erasable upon request, subject to customs retention requirements (7 years).

requirements.title: Customs Data Encryption
requirements.description: All electronic customs declarations containing recipient personal data must be transmitted over encrypted channels (TLS 1.3+).

requirements.title: Cross-Border Data Transfer Controls
requirements.description: Transfers of EU resident data to third countries require adequacy decision or standard contractual clauses.

requirements.title: Recipient Notification
requirements.description: Recipients must be notified that their personal data will be shared with customs authorities in destination country.

requirements.title: Data Retention Limits
requirements.description: Shipment records containing PII must be purged after regulatory retention period (typically 10 years). Automated deletion required.

requirements.title: Electronic Signature on Manifests
requirements.description: Customs manifests for cross-border shipments should use qualified electronic signatures for authenticity.

requirements.title: Customs Data Encryption
requirements.description: All electronic customs declarations containing recipient personal data must be transmitted over encrypted channels (TLS 1.3+).

requirements.title: Cross-Border Data Transfer Controls
requirements.description: Transfers of EU resident data to third countries require adequacy decision or standard contractual clauses.

requirements.title: Recipient Notification
requirements.description: Recipients must be notified that their personal data will be shared with customs authorities in destination country.

requirements.title: Data Retention Limits
requirements.description: Shipment records containing PII must be purged after regulatory retention period (typically 10 years). Automated deletion required.

requirements.title: Electronic Signature on Manifests
requirements.description: Customs manifests for cross-border shipments should use qualified electronic signatures for authenticity.

requirements.title: Cross-Border Transfer Consent
requirements.description: Data subjects must explicitly consent to transfer of their personal data across Nigerian borders. Consent records must be maintained.

requirements.title: Import Documentation Compliance
requirements.description: Pre-arrival assessment reports required for shipments above USD 1,000. HS code verification mandatory.

requirements.title: Lawful Processing of Recipient Data
requirements.description: Recipient PII must be processed only for shipment delivery purpose. Secondary use requires separate consent.

us.framework: CBP ACE + CCPA + TSA Cargo Security

requirements.title: Automated Commercial Environment
requirements.description: All imports must be filed through CBP ACE. Importer Security Filing (ISF) required 24h before vessel loading.

requirements.title: Air Cargo Advance Screening
requirements.description: Air cargo must be screened before loading. Carrier must transmit cargo data to TSA at least 4 hours before departure.

requirements.title: California Recipient Data Rights
requirements.description: California-based recipients have right to know what data is collected and right to deletion of shipment records.

requirements.title: Electronic Trade Documentation

requirements.title: Youth Protection & Age Verification
requirements.description: Platforms offering content rated 16+ or 18+ must implement verified age gates. Self-declaration is insufficient — ID verification required.

requirements.title: Content Licensing & Copyright
requirements.description: All streamed content must have documented licenses for DE territory. Geo-blocking required for content without German rights.

requirements.title: Cookie & Tracking Consent
requirements.description: Explicit, informed consent required before any analytics, advertising, or behavioral tracking cookies are set.

requirements.title: Account & Data Deletion
requirements.description: Users must be able to delete their account and all associated data (watch history, preferences, payment info) within 30 days.

requirements.title: Data Minimization for Analytics
requirements.description: Behavioral tracking data must be anonymized or pseudonymized. Purpose limitation applies — cannot use watch data for unrelated profiling.

gb.framework: UK GDPR + Online Safety Act + BBFC

requirements.title: Age Assurance for Adult Content
requirements.description: Platforms must implement "highly effective" age verification. Acceptable methods: credit card check, digital ID, or third-party age verification service.

requirements.title: Content Classification Compliance
requirements.description: All video-on-demand content must carry BBFC classification or equivalent. Misclassification can result in £18M fines.

requirements.title: Children's Data Protection
requirements.description: Parental consent required for processing data of users under 13. Age-appropriate design code applies to services likely used by children.

requirements.title: Consent Before Tracking
requirements.description: No tracking cookies or pixels may be set before user provides informed, specific consent. Pre-ticked boxes are not valid consent.

requirements.title: Content Classification
requirements.description: All video content must be classified by NFVCB before distribution. Minimum age ratings must be displayed.

requirements.title: Local Content Quota
requirements.description: Streaming platforms serving Nigerian users must ensure minimum 30% local Nigerian content in their catalogue.

requirements.title: User Consent for Data Collection
requirements.description: Explicit user consent required before collecting viewing behavior data. Users must be informed in plain language.

requirements.title: Children's Online Privacy Protection
requirements.description: Verifiable parental consent required before collecting personal information from children under 13. No behavioral advertising to children.

requirements.title: Consumer Privacy Rights
requirements.description: California users have right to know, delete, and opt-out of sale of watch history, behavioral data, and preferences.

requirements.title: Digital Millennium Copyright Act
requirements.description: Platform must implement notice-and-takedown procedures. Safe harbor requires designated DMCA agent and expedient takedown.

requirements.title: DRM & Content Protection
requirements.description: Streaming content must implement Digital Rights Management to prevent unauthorized copying and redistribution.

requirements.title: Over-the-Top Content License
requirements.description: Video streaming platforms with significant reach must hold IMDA OTT Content Provider license.

requirements.title: Behavioral Data Retention Limits
requirements.description: User behavioral data must not be retained beyond business purpose. Automatic deletion schedules required.

requirements.title: Content Rating Compliance
requirements.description: All content must carry approved rating labels (G, PG, PG13, NC16, M18, R21). Age-gating mandatory for R21 content.
